buttons.name: AstraEditor 官网-CC特制版(.cc)
buttons.subtitle: editors.astras.cc
buttons.author: ningqi
buttons.description: AstraEditor 是一款基于 Scratch 的增强型造型编辑器，提供更好的造型编辑器、更多插件和自定义主题，让编程速度「快如闪电」。这是部署在 .cc 域名上的特制版本。
buttons.description_en: AstraEditor is an enhanced Scratch costume editor with a better paint editor, more addons, and custom themes for lightning-fast coding. This is the special version deployed on the .cc domain.

buttons.name: AstraEditor 下载站(.cc)
buttons.subtitle: download.astras.cc
buttons.author: ningqi
buttons.description: AstraEditor 各平台客户端下载站。提供大陆地区 GitHub 代理加速下载（按省份分配 ghproxy 节点），并附带 Chrome/Edge 并行下载提速指南。
buttons.description_en: Download station for AstraEditor clients across platforms. Provides GitHub proxy acceleration for mainland China (province-based ghproxy routing) with Chrome/Edge parallel download tips.

buttons.name: Search 极简页
buttons.subtitle: search.astras.cc
buttons.author: ningqi
buttons.description: 一个极简风格的搜索引擎首页，界面干净清爽，专注于快速搜索。
buttons.description_en: A minimalist search engine homepage with a clean interface focused on quick searching.

buttons.name: Minichat聊天 - Astras.cc
buttons.subtitle: minichat.astras.cc
buttons.author: ningqi
buttons.description: MiniChat 是一款轻量级在线聊天室（当前版本 4.0.0）。支持注册登录、全局聊天、自定义头像、桌面通知与提示音、@提醒、主题与语言切换等丰富功能。
buttons.description_en: MiniChat is a lightweight online chat room (currently v4.0.0). Features include registration/login, global chat, custom avatars, desktop notifications and sounds, @mentions, theme and language switching, and more.

buttons.name: SimpleChatMini for scratch
buttons.subtitle: simplechatmini.astras.cc
buttons.author: ningqi
buttons.description: 基于 Scratch 的简易聊天 UI 组件，使用 WebGL 渲染，可在 Scratch 项目中嵌入聊天界面。
buttons.description_en: A simple chat UI component for Scratch projects, rendered with WebGL, allowing chat interfaces to be embedded in Scratch projects.

buttons.name: 用域名发送邮件 - Astras.cc
buttons.name_en: Send email with domain name - Astras.cc
buttons.subtitle: astras.cc/sendemail
buttons.author: ningqi
buttons.description: 使用自定义域名发送邮件的在线工具。填写收件人、主题和内容（支持 HTML 格式）即可发送邮件。
buttons.description_en: An online tool to send emails with a custom domain. Simply fill in the recipient, subject, and content (HTML supported) to send.

buttons.name: 高速编号牌生成器 - NanGua-QWQ
buttons.name_en: High Speed Number Card Generator - NanGua-QWQ
buttons.subtitle: astras.cc/SignGenerator
buttons.author: NanGua-QWQ
buttons.description: 在线生成中国高速公路编号牌图片的工具。支持国家高速和省高速两种类型，可自定义道路编号（1/2/4 位数字）和高速名称，实时预览并导出编号牌图片。
buttons.description_en: An online tool to generate Chinese expressway number sign images. Supports national and provincial highway types with custom road numbers (1/2/4 digits) and highway names, with real-time preview and export.

buttons.name: AstraEditor 官网(.top)
buttons.subtitle: editors.astras.top
buttons.author: AstraTeam
buttons.description: AstraEditor 的官方网站（.top 域名），同样提供增强型造型编辑器、更多插件和自定义主题，内容与 .cc 版本一致。
buttons.description_en: The official website of AstraEditor on the .top domain, offering the same enhanced costume editor, more addons, and custom themes as the .cc version.

buttons.name: COLID Studio
buttons.subtitle: colid.mysxl.cn
buttons.author: COLID Studio
buttons.description: COLID 创意工作室官方网站。使用 Scratch 图形化编程制作操作系统，产品包括 COLID OS（支持窗口拖动、窗口堆叠、任务栏、拓展程序）和 Arc Os 移动端系统。
buttons.description_en: Official website of COLID Studio. Creates operating systems using Scratch visual programming, with products including COLID OS (window dragging, window stacking, taskbar, extensions) and Arc Os mobile system.

buttons.name: COLID NS UI for scratch
buttons.subtitle: colidns.mysxl.cn
buttons.author: ningqi
buttons.description: COLID CE 出品的 NS UI 界面重制项目，旨在让 COLID OS 焕然一新。采用 CC-BY-4.0 开源协议，包含 NS 2.6UI 等版本，兼容部分原版拓展应用。
buttons.description_en: A UI redesign project by COLID CE, aiming to refresh COLID OS with a new look. Released under CC-BY-4.0 license, includes versions like NS 2.6UI, compatible with select original extensions.

buttons.name: ToingOS/NQOS UI for scratch
buttons.subtitle: ningqi24.mysxl.cn
buttons.author: ningqi
buttons.description: ToingOS 是 Ning Qi.24 用 Scratch 制作的操作系统，追寻 COLID OS 的质心之作。包含锁屏登录、桌面壁纸、音量/网络/蓝牙控制、设置面板、WLAN 面板、音乐应用、Dock 栏等功能，持续迭代更新至 1.995 版本。
buttons.description_en: ToingOS is a Scratch-based operating system by Ning Qi.24, inspired by COLID OS. Features include lock screen, desktop wallpapers, volume/network/bluetooth controls, settings panel, WLAN panel, music app, dock bar, and more, continuously updated to v1.995.

buttons.name: ningqi-github
buttons.subtitle: github.com/ningqi24
buttons.author: ningqi
buttons.description: ningqi 的 GitHub 主页，包含所有开源项目与代码仓库。
buttons.description_en: ningqi's GitHub profile, featuring all open-source projects and repositories.

buttons.name: ToingOS 官网
buttons.subtitle: ningqi24.mysxl.cn
buttons.author: ningqi
buttons.description: ToingOS 官方网站，追寻 COLID OS 的质心之作。展示拓影操作系统的版本更新日志、功能特性与下载入口，持续迭代更新至 1.995 版本。
buttons.description_en: Official site of ToingOS, a Scratch-based OS inspired by COLID OS. Features version changelog, feature highlights, and download links, updated to v1.995.

buttons.name: ningqi开发社
buttons.subtitle: nqxz.mysxl.cn
buttons.author: ningqi
buttons.description: ningqi 的作品下载站，收录 NQ_OS、NQ_I_OS、NQ_i_V OS、拓影 OS、ToIngOS 等各代 Scratch 伪系统作品及其他项目的蓝奏云/123云盘下载链接。
buttons.description_en: ningqi's download hub, hosting all generations of Scratch pseudo-OS projects including NQ_OS, NQ_I_OS, NQ_i_V OS, TuoyingOS, and ToIngOS via Lanzou/123 cloud drives.

buttons.name: COLID NS
buttons.subtitle: colidns.mysxl.cn
buttons.author: COLID CE
buttons.description: COLID NS 操作系统官网，COLID CE 团队出品。包含 NS 2.6 UI 等版本下载，致力于让 ColidOS 焕然一新，使用 CC-BY-4.0 开源协议。
buttons.description_en: Official site of COLID NS OS by COLID CE team. Features NS 2.6 UI download, aiming to refresh ColidOS with a new look. Licensed under CC-BY-4.0.
